state.next-action: Phase 02 planned. 5 tasks registered (02-01..05). Per-task handoffs planted in .planning/handoffs/open/.

state-log.entry: 272-07+272-09: Supabase order persistence + Resend confirmation email wired into /api/checkout; graceful degradation on missing keys; build clean
272-04: Square Web Payments checkout live — CheckoutForm (SDK tokenize) + /api/checkout (Payments API) + /store/checkout page + BoxCard CTA wired; graceful unconfigured path verified; build clean

272-01+272-02: Square Node SDK catalog client + /store browse page; SDK install + fetchFullCatalog + BoxCard + fallback-when-no-env
Task 02-01 complete: Rebrand 7Greens→7G Greens across all UI copy, metadata, constants. Build passes. Commit: 36ef748
Phase 02 PLAN.md created. Tasks 02-01..05 registered. Rebrand 7Greens→7G Greens (02-01) is highest priority. Build verification (02-02) prerequisite for all other tasks.
01-01 done by codex: file-write-only bootstrap. install + shadcn deferred - operator runs after rename subagent (gad-visual-context publish) lands.

7greens project initialized: PROJECT.md + REQUIREMENTS.md + ROADMAP.md + STATE.md drafted. 6 phases registered (00 cancelled, 01 active, 02-06 planned). Phase 1 tasks 01-01..05 (FOUND-*) registered. Next: /gad:plan-phase 01
